summary: Iteration 2 testing — All 22 new backend tests + 28 regression tests pass (50/50). Frontend referral flow (Landing.jsx with ?ref param) shows referral result modal with copy-referral-btn and referral-link. Worker dashboard search input, sort select (budget_desc verified: [3000,2500,1500,1000]), profile badges (Trophy, Level, completed_count, progress bar, ₹earned) all working. Submit modal with file upload (submit-file-input) successfully uploads to Emergent object storage, filename displays, submission saved with file_path/file_name and toast 'Submitted for review!' shown. Resend gracefully skipped (logged 'email skipped: no RESEND_API_KEY') with no crashes. Object storage initialized on backend startup.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: load_dotenv called twice (lines 17 and 24) — harmless but redundant; consolidate.

server.py apply_to_task: the 'already applied' check (line 355) raises 400 BEFORE the assigned/applicants branching; per spec, repeated apply on assigned task by same worker would still return 400 not {assigned:false}. Acceptable but worth a comment.
storage.py: synchronous `requests` calls inside async FastAPI route — works but blocks event loop on uploads; consider httpx.AsyncClient or run_in_threadpool for high concurrency.
Frontend WorkerDashboard task card data-testid scheme is `task-${task_id}` but submit/apply buttons inside cards open a modal; the modal-submit-btn is wired correctly. No bug, just doc-worthy.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (referral modal, search, sort, badges, file upload + submit all verified)

test_credentials: Sessions inserted via mongosh shortcut against demo users (user_demo_worker1/client1/admin/worker2/client2). RESEND_API_KEY intentionally empty — verified no crash, log shows 'email skipped'.
seed_data_creation: All TEST_* prefixed waitlist/tasks/files/badges/submissions cleaned up via teardown_module and final mongosh script.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 is solid. Backend has 50 tests across 2 files. Object storage works with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY. Resend stubbed off. Future iterations: if RESEND_API_KEY is provided, add e2e assertion for actual send. ClientDashboard review-file-download chip is rendered conditionally on submission.file_path — covered visually by submit flow but not exhaustively from client side; could add a future test.
